beacon_of_white.name: Beacon of White
beacon_of_white.description: On entry, summons Blinding Radiance weather.

eyes_of_blue.name: Eyes of Blue
eyes_of_blue.description: Redirects single-target attacks away from allied Dragons to this mon when possible and boosts teammates SpAtk when targeted.

graveyard_king.name: Graveyard King
graveyard_king.description: Gains +30% ATK while there are 2+ monsters in the GY.

zombie_lord.name: Zombie Lord
zombie_lord.description: On entry, becomes Vitalized if no primary status is active.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.description: Lowers the physical Attack stat stage of all active adjacent opponents by 1 level upon entering the field.

regenerator.name: Regenerator
regenerator.description: Automatically restores 33% Max HP when switching out of the active combat slot back into the reserve bench.

levitate.name: Levitate
levitate.description: Grants complete immunity to all incoming EARTH-type attacks, entry hazards, and terrain-based field modifiers.

prankster.name: Prankster
prankster.description: Grants +1 priority to all moves categorized as Status moves.

guts.name: Guts
guts.description: Boosts physical Attack by 1.5x if afflicted with a status condition, while ignoring the attack reduction penalty of Burns.

sturdy.name: Sturdy
sturdy.description: Prevents the monster from being knocked out from full health by a single attack, leaving it at 1 HP instead.

serene_grace.name: Serene Grace
serene_grace.description: Doubles the baseline trigger probability of secondary effects on attacks.

mold_breaker.name: Mold Breaker
mold_breaker.description: Allows the user's moves to bypass or ignore defensive enemy abilities during damage and accuracy calculation.

flash_fire.name: Flash Fire
flash_fire.description: Grants total immunity to FIRE-type attacks. When struck by FIRE, boosts damage output of next Fire move.

volt_absorb.name: Volt Absorb
volt_absorb.description: Grants total immunity to LIGHT-type attacks. When struck by LIGHT, heals 25% max HP instead.

swift_swim.name: Swift Swim
swift_swim.description: Doubles raw Speed stat while weather is active on the field.

chlorophyll.name: Chlorophyll
chlorophyll.description: Doubles raw Speed stat while harsh sunlight weather is active.
